label: Self-hosted Scrum
description: Scrum on your own infrastructure with OmniProject's built-in database as the system of record — no external backend to connect and no external database. Minimal egress, on-device speech, AI off. The Scrum methodology is curated in with its reference ruleset, a starter sprint project and a delivery dashboard. Pair with the self-hosted deployment preset (BUILTIN_BROKER) so the built-in store is the SoR.
